---
title: "The Life and Perambulation of a Mouse"
---

## The Life and Perambulation of a Mouse

**Author:** Dorothy Kilner
**Date:** 1783
**Imprint:** London: Marshall

### Notes

CMY had reprinted this work in <i>[[cmybook:83]A Storehouse of Stories]</i> (1870).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
